waves.summary: RT writer per-spec ndjson event log: novo modulo events_ndjson em apps/rt; append-write {ts-ns}-{run-id}-{pid}.ndjson; blob spill content-addressed (sha256, >4KB); parent_id capturado de subagent context; refator dos hooks PreToolUse/PostToolUse/SubagentStart/SubagentStop pra escrever ndjson; nova mini-tabela pipeline_events em mustard.db so para lifecycle (pipeline.status/phase/scope); drop da tabela events e events_fts; layout .claude/.session/{slug}/events quando sem spec ativa

Core reader: novo modulo events_ndjson em packages/core/src/reader que le os ndjson per-spec/per-wave + le pipeline_events; refator de reader/sqlite.rs (mantem contract estavel pro dashboard); atualizacao de projection/timeline.rs e projection/card.rs para incluir tokens_in/out, duration_ms, status, input/output (com $ref para blobs), parent_id; atualizacao de model/view/timeline.rs com o shape novo; nova rebuild-specs/rebuild-metrics_projection a partir de ndjson

Dashboard claude-devtools-style: rewrite apps/dashboard/src/features/specs/SpecTimelineTab e features/telemetry/PipelineTimeline; nova familia src/features/specs/SpecEventRenderers com BashRenderer/ReadRenderer (Code/Preview toggle)/EditRenderer (diff)/WriteRenderer/GlobRenderer/GrepRenderer/TaskRenderer (recursao via parent_id)/DefaultRenderer; novos Tauri commands events_for_spec, events_for_wave, read_blob; live tail via notify-rs no src-tauri emitindo Tauri event consumido pelo React; sem PageHeader; folder-per-component padrao do dashboard

Sessions index: nova tabela sessions em mustard.db (id, slug, started_at, ended_at, spec_id, tool_count, tokens_total); atualizacao session_start.rs e session_end.rs para INSERT/UPDATE; layout .claude/.session/{slug}/events ja preparado em W1; nova rota apps/dashboard/src/pages/Sessions.tsx + Sidebar listando sessoes com/sem spec; Tauri commands list_sessions e events_for_session

Comando manual de cleanup: novo apps/rt/src/run/spec_clear.rs implementando mustard-rt run spec-clear; flags --dry-run (default), --apply, --all, --name <slug>, --age-days <N> (default 15); algoritmo varre specs com Stage=Close + Outcome=Done com mtime de events/ mais antiga que N dias; remove pasta events/ e blobs/ preservando spec.md, wave-plan.md e wave-N-{role}/spec.md; novo skill apps/cli/templates/commands/mustard/spec/clear/SKILL.md
